title: Item Shuffle
description: Be the first to collect a certain item.
body:
# Item Shuffle

This is an Item Shuffle plugin for 1.20+

The game is simple, a random item is choosen, and you must be the first to obtain this item


# How to use

- Stop your server if it is already running
- Download this plugin and put it in the plugins folder of your server
- Start your server
- Start the game with the command `/itemshuffle start`

The game starts with all the online players

You can start with a precise item using `/itemshuffle start item [item]`

You can specify a maximum average time it should take to collect this item (no default): `/itemshuffle start maxiumumAverageTime [seconds]`

You can edit the config in the plugin folder.


# Additonnal information

If you are asked an unobtainable item, create an issue in the github page so i add it in the default blacklist.

If you want to use it for your video, simply mention the link to this page in your description. 


# Features

- Choose a precise or random item
- Keeps track of the average time, server best time and personal bests.
- Uses a new world every time (a bit laggy, solutions will be found in the future) 


# Upcoming features

In the next updates, may be added:

- item difficulties (basic/easy/medium...) depending on the average time they take
- and more with your suggestions


# Permissions

- `itemshuffle.start` => Permission for the `/itemshuffle` and all its subcommands
